headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk/opportunity (valuation swing via passive fund flows and cost of capital effects) — Adani Power gains NSE Sustainability recognition, enhancing ESG profile and passive fund eligibility
what_matters: Possible P/E premium of 5-10% if sustained; no immediate margin impact.
BRSR compliance reinforced; reduces risk of SEBI penalties or trading restrictions.
Potential reduction in cost of capital by 20-40bps; increased attractiveness for ESG funds.
action: No immediate action required, but maintain ESG disclosure momentum to capture long-term valuation benefits.
Opportunity: First-mover advantage in ESG index inclusion and narrative differentiation.
